items.text: line 17: This document describes the current architecture and target direction. It separates **managed runtime runs** from **managed sessions** because `gemini_cli` and future runtimes may be managed-run capable before they are session-capable.

line 9: Per the hard-switch plan §1 and §5, the following remain correct and are excluded from every count below: `Temporal Task`, `Workflow Task`, `Activity Task`, `Task Queue` / `task_queue`, `Jira task`, `Codex provider task`. All other unqualified MoonMind "task" usage is residual.
